testcase.name: testUpdateMonsterOnNonExistentIdDoesNotAddNewEntry

failure.message: Updating a non-existent id should not add a new monster ==> expected: <true> but was: <false>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Updating a non-existent id should not add a new monster ==> expected: <true> but was: <false> at testcase.name: targeted_updateMonsterDoesNotInsertNewEntry

failure.message: FAILS on DaoD: updateMonster inserts a new monster when id doesn't exist ==> expected: <null> but was: <Monster{name=Ghost, type=YETI, peopleEaten=3, favoriteFood=Brains}>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: FAILS on DaoD: updateMonster inserts a new monster when id doesn't exist ==> expected: <null> but was: <Monster{name=Ghost, type=YETI, peopleEaten=3, favoriteFood=Brains}> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionUtils.fail(AssertionUtils.java:54) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertNull.failNotNull(AssertNull.java:48) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertNull.assertNull(AssertNull.java:37) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertNull(Assertions.java:241) at
